quality.rationale: 基于协变导数对易子与里奇张量对称性的纯张量恒等式证明，逻辑链完整但缺乏具体物理场景应用

origin.question:
Problem 9.10. Prove that for any second rank tensor$$\mathrm {A}_{; \mu 
u}^{\mu 
u} = \mathrm {A}_{; 
u \mu}^{\mu 
u}.$$
origin.solution:
Solution 9.10. Form the tensor$$\mathbf {C}_{\mu 
u}^{\alpha  eta} \equiv \mathbf {A}_{; \mu 
u}^{\alpha  eta} - \mathbf {A}_{; 
u \mu}^{\alpha  eta}.$$From Problem 9.8 we have$$\mathbf {C}_{\mu 
u}^{\alpha  eta} = - \mathbf {A}_{\sigma \mu 
u}^{\sigma  eta} \mathbf {R}_{\sigma \mu 
u}^{\alpha} - \mathbf {A}_{\sigma \mu 
u}^{\alpha \sigma} \mathbf {R}_{\sigma \mu 
u}^{ eta}$$so that$$\mathbf {C}_{\mu 
u}^{\mu 
u} = - \mathrm {A}_{\sigma \mu 
u}^{\sigma 
u} \mathbf {R}_{\sigma \mu 
u}^{\mu} - \mathrm {A}_{\sigma \mu 
u}^{\mu \sigma} \mathbf {R}_{\sigma \mu 
u}^{
u} = - \mathrm {A}_{\sigma 
u}^{\sigma 
u} \mathbf {R}_{\sigma 
u} + \mathrm {A}_{\sigma \mu}^{\mu \sigma} \mathbf {R}_{\sigma \mu} = 0.$$
